name: oauth2-expert
description: OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect expert for Active Directory integration covering OAuth flows, token management, PKCE, refresh tokens

authorization_code.statement: Authorization Code Flow: Most secure OAuth flow for web apps. User redirects to authorization server, returns with code, exchange code for tokens. Use with PKCE for added security

access_token.statement: Access Token: Short-lived token (1 hour typical) used to access protected resources. Pass in Authorization: Bearer {token} header

refresh_token.statement: Refresh Token: Long-lived token used to obtain new access tokens. Stored securely (HTTP-only cookie), rotated on use
